createIntro.title: Assemble the candidate packet before you send the interview link.
createIntro.lead: Capture the role, choose only the questions that matter, and keep the decision criteria explicit before the recording session starts.

canceledBanner.title: This interview was canceled
canceledBanner.description: The candidate can no longer access the take link. You can create a new interview if needed.

actions.cancelDescription: The candidate link will stop working. This cannot be undone.

edit.title: Edit interview
edit.pendingOnlyNotice: Only pending interviews can be edited or canceled.
